title: Maximum Binary Tree
description: Từ nums, xây max binary tree: root là max, trái/phải là max tree của hai nửa.
approach: Recursive: max index là root; left=build(l..max-1), right=build(max+1..r).
memoryTip: Maximum binary tree — divide at max element.

solutions.c: struct TreeNode* constructMaximumBinaryTree(int* a,int n){ if(!n)return NULL; int mx=0,i; for(i=1;i<n;i++) if(a[i]>a[mx]) mx=i; struct TreeNode* r=malloc(sizeof(*r)); r->val=a[mx]; r->left=constructMaximumBinaryTree(a,mx); r->right=constructMaximumBinaryTree(a+mx+1,n-mx-1); return r; }

analysis.correctness: Max là root — cấu trúc unique theo đề.
